extraction.one_line_summary: VERONA Carlos won after breakaway argument with FRAILE, while ROGLIČ Primož defended yellow with composed climbing to split favorites.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ Primož deliberately used two slopes before ski jump to split group, revealing controlled aggression rather than reactive defense.
VERONA Carlos refused to work with FRAILE Omar before final climb, conserving energy specifically for stage win over bonuses.
LANDA Mikel attempted split at unspecified climb but ROGLIČ made nullification look easy, signaling hierarchical gap between them.
PADUN Mark performed unusual mountain domestique work for ROGLIČ despite young rider status, indicating team tactical flexibility.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: composed dismantling of attacks on brutal terrain suggests time trial strength translates to mountain defense capability
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: dropped with head bowed after previously running strongly, revealing either tactical over-extension or form collapse
rider_signals.VERONA Carlos: positive: craftily refused work then out-sprinted chasers for stage win, demonstrating calculated energy management
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: attempted split but failed to distance ROGLIČ, confirming insufficient acceleration to trouble top-tier climbers
rider_signals.PADUN Mark: positive: extensive mountain work despite young rider status indicates climbing domestique potential beyond age expectations
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: sat in chase group using BETANCUR Carlos being ahead as excuse, revealing conservative GC calculation
rider_signals.FRAILE Omar: negative: argued with VERONA about work contribution then got beaten, suggesting poor situational awareness
